offer_thesis: Provide a narrow compliance evidence concierge for small financial firms: assemble, track, and package evidence for one audit, diligence, or review cycle without offering legal advice or formal compliance sign-off.

icp.buyer: COO, operations lead, compliance manager, or founder
icp.segment: Small financial firms such as RIAs, specialty finance operators, fund admins, and lean fintech teams facing recurring audits or diligence requests
icp.why_now: An upcoming audit, diligence request, annual compliance cycle, or investor/client review is creating evidence-collection pressure on a small team

offer_shape: Concierge hybrid that can later productize
deliverables: Kickoff call to define one review scope
Shared tracker for items, owners, status, and gaps
Weekly async follow-up and document chasing
Organized folder structure and naming convention
Gap summary for missing or stale evidence
Final readiness packet with tracker, document index, and open items
scope_boundaries: One defined review, audit, or diligence cycle only
No legal advice or regulatory interpretation
No adequacy sign-off or formal audit opinion
No outsourced CCO or compliance officer role
No custom legal policy drafting beyond light formatting or organization support

pricing_hypothesis.range_or_price: $2,500-$6,000 per sprint, plus optional fast-turn or extra-scope add-ons
pricing_hypothesis.pricing_rationale: Price maps to the number of stakeholders, evidence volume, urgency, and the buyer value of saving internal team time while improving review readiness

open_questions: Which firm subtype responds fastest within the user's warm network?
Is the first sale easier around annual compliance reviews, client diligence, or audit prep?
What evidence volume and turnaround time best separate the base package from an urgent add-on?
